item.title: CVE-2026-53359 - CVE-2026-53359 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
Januscape-Hotfix: Complete fix collection for the CVE-2026-53359 guest-to-host escape vulnerability in the KVM/x86 shadow MMU. From zero-downtime livepatch to kernel upgrade — covers every operational scenario. / KVM/x86 shadow MMU 虚拟机逃逸漏洞（CVE-2026-53359）的完整修复方案集合。 从零停机热修复到内核升级，覆盖所有运维场景。

item.title: CVE-2026-31431 - CVE-2026-31431 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
CVE-2026-31431-Linux-Copy-Fail: Exploit CVE-2026-31431 on Linux using a Rust implementation to achieve local privilege escalation via an arbitrary page cache write primitive.
copyfail-rs: Exploit and detect CVE-2026-31431 vulnerabilities using a static binary that monitors system integrity and bypasses PAM authentication.
